title: Baryxylum adnatum
taxonomy: Baryxylum adnatum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It belongs to the genus Baryxylum, which is a part of the order Magnoliales. The Annonaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, commonly known as the custard apple family. Baryxylum adnatum is native to tropical regions and is characterized by its unique floral and fruit structures. Further research on this species may provide more specific and detailed information regarding its classification.
